message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 233 migrate 5 wezterm direct-call sites (ls/show/human-send) to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues tick 230-232's wezterm surface migration. Five more sites:

1. L23920 `ft list` command: `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
2. L24167 `ft show <pane_id>` command: `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
3. L24204 `ft show --output` subset: `wezterm.get_text_with_cx(&cx, pane_id, false)`
   (reuses `cx` from same-scope get_pane migration above)
4. L24307 human send dry-run: `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
5. L24360 human send pane-verify: `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Progress: 21/28 wezterm sites migrated (75%). Remaining 7 sites:
- L24639 (human get_text)
- L24721, L24747 (workspace commands)
- L25318 (workspace restore list)
- L26455 (human commit send)
- L26984 (human commit show)
- L35478 (cross-boundary helper)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
